Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log with three cases C001 C002 C003 The same activity names appear multiple times within a single case We need to rename them to reflect contextual differences

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case C001 Verify Documents appears twice first verification initial and second verification after additional docs

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case C002 Call Customer appears twice first call to clarify discrepancy second call to confirm adjustments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case C003 Verify Documents appears twice first verification initial physical and second verification after account adjustment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says the same activity names appear multiple times within a single case but carry different contextual meanings depending on when and how they occur

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We might want to differentiate based on context across cases

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: If we only rename the recurring ones then in C001 we have two Verify Documents renamed but in C002 the single Verify Documents remains as Verify Documents which might be ambiguous

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets read carefully Identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case and interpret how their meaning changes depending on their position in the process or the associated context

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: To make the log fully disambiguated we could also rename all Verify Documents and Call Customer activities to reflect their specific context in each case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For C001 First Verify Documents becomes Initial Document Verification Second Verify Documents becomes Re Verification After Additional Documents Call Customer becomes Call Customer to Request Missing Documents

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For C002 Verify Documents becomes Initial Document Verification First Call Customer becomes Call Customer to Clarify Account Discrepancy Second Call Customer becomes Call Customer to Confirm Adjustments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For C003 First Verify Documents becomes Initial Physical Verification Call Customer becomes Call Customer to Return to Branch Second Verify Documents becomes Re Verification After Account Adjustment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This will make the log fully disambiguated and the justification will explain each
